title: Sakhigopal Temple
tagline: Sakhigopal Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Sakhigopal Mandir (formally Satyabadi Gopinatha Mandir) is a medieval Hindu temple dedicated to Gopinath located in Sakhigopal on the Bhubaneshwar - Puri Highway in Odisha.
overview.description: Sakhigopal Mandir (formally Satyabadi Gopinatha Mandir) is a medieval Hindu temple dedicated to Gopinath located in Sakhigopal on the Bhubaneshwar - Puri Highway in Odisha. The mandir is built in the Kalinga Architecture style.

topPlaces.name: Sakhigopal
topPlaces.description: Sakhigopal or Satyabadi is a town in Puri district in the Indian state of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Lokanatha Temple
topPlaces.description: Lokanatha Temple is a Hindu temple in the town of Puri, Odisha, India. It is dedicated to the god Shiva as Lokanatha.

topPlaces.name: Patuari
topPlaces.description: Patuari is a village in the borough of Sakhigopal on the River Bhargavi in Puri district of the Indian state of Odisha. It is located about 17 km north from district headquarters Puri and 42 km from state capital Bhubaneswar.

topPlaces.name: Biranarasingh Pur
topPlaces.description: Biranarasingh Pur is one of the oldest sasana village in Puri district in Odisha. The village is named after the great king of Odisha Gajapati Narasingh Dev.

topPlaces.name: Raghurajpur
topPlaces.description: Raghurajpur is a heritage crafts village in Puri district, Odisha, India, known for its master Pattachitra painters, an art form which dates back to 5 BC in the region, and Gotipua dance troupes, the precursor to the Indian classical dance form of Odissi. It is also known as the birthplace of the Odissi exponents Padma Vibhushan Guru and Kelucharan Mohapatra and the Gotipua dancer Padma Shri Guru Maguni Charan Das.

topPlaces.name: Malatipatapur
topPlaces.description: Malatipatapur is a village in Sadar Tehsil in Puri District of India's Odisha state. It is a small village located 6 km towards North from District headquarters Puri and 53 km from State capital Bhubaneswar.

items.note: Sakhigopal or Satyabadi is a town in Puri district in the Indian state of Odisha.
Lokanatha Temple is a Hindu temple in the town of Puri, Odisha, India. It is dedicated to the god Shiva as Lokanatha.

Patuari is a village in the borough of Sakhigopal on the River Bhargavi in Puri district of the Indian state of Odisha. It is located about 17 km north from district headquarters Puri and 42 km from state capital Bhubaneswar.
Biranarasingh Pur is one of the oldest sasana village in Puri district in Odisha. The village is named after the great king of Odisha Gajapati Narasingh Dev.

Raghurajpur is a heritage crafts village in Puri district, Odisha, India, known for its master Pattachitra painters, an art form which dates back to 5 BC in the region, and Gotipua dance troupes, the precursor to the Indian classical dance form of Odissi. It is also known as the birthplace of the Odissi exponents Padma Vibhushan Guru and Kelucharan Mohapatra and the Gotipua dancer Padma Shri Guru Maguni Charan Das.

Malatipatapur is a village in Sadar Tehsil in Puri District of India's Odisha state. It is a small village located 6 km towards North from District headquarters Puri and 53 km from State capital Bhubaneswar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sakhigopal Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sakhigopal Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sakhigopal Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (33 km) and the nearest railway station is Puri Railway Station (15 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sakhigopal Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sakhigopal Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sakhigopal Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sakhigopal Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sakhigopal Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sakhigopal, Lokanatha Temple, Patuari, Biranarasingh Pur, Raghurajpur.
